# PGDCM

Probabilistic Graphical Diagnostic Classification Model (development)

The main program is “runPGDCM.R” Specify graph structure using the
prefix of the nodes file and the edges file (e.g., DTMRedges.csv and
DTMRnodes.csv) Specify data set as an EXCEL spreadsheet using a format
such as: DTMRdata.xlsx The graph structure and data set have to be
compatible and the program tries to check this

Tutorial papers can be found in the folder “TUTORIALPAPERS”

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AdjMatrix2CytoNodes()`](AdjMatrix2CytoNodes.md) : Push Adjacency
  Matrix to Cytoscape
- [`AdjMatrix2iGraph()`](AdjMatrix2iGraph.md) : Convert Adjacency Matrix
  directly to igraph
- [`QMatrix2CytoNodes()`](QMatrix2CytoNodes.md) : Push Q-Matrix to
  Cytoscape
- [`QMatrix2iGraph()`](QMatrix2iGraph.md) : Convert Q-Matrix directly to
  igraph
- [`Tasks2CytoNodes()`](Tasks2CytoNodes.md) : Push Standalone Task Nodes
  to Cytoscape
- [`build_from_adjacency()`](build_from_adjacency.md) : Build Graph from
  an Adjacency Matrix
- [`build_from_node_edge_files()`](build_from_node_edge_files.md) :
  Build Graph from Node and Edge Files
- [`build_from_q_matrix()`](build_from_q_matrix.md) : Build Graph from a
  Q-Matrix
- [`build_model_config()`](build_model_config.md) : Build Model
  Configuration
- [`check_mcmc_convergence()`](check_mcmc_convergence.md) : Check MCMC
  Convergence
- [`compute_M2()`](compute_M2.md) : Compute Second-Order Moment Matrix
- [`create_edge_df()`](create_edge_df.md) : Create a Standardized Edge
  DataFrame
- [`create_node_df()`](create_node_df.md) : Create a Standardized Node
  DataFrame
- [`determine_model_type()`](determine_model_type.md) : Determine Model
  Type
- [`enforce_topo_sort()`](enforce_topo_sort.md) : Enforce Topological
  Sort on Attributes
- [`filter_structural_nas()`](filter_structural_nas.md) : Filter
  Structural NAs from MCMC Samples
- [`get_EdgesTable()`](get_EdgesTable.md) : Extract Edges Table from
  Graph
- [`get_NodesTable()`](get_NodesTable.md) : Extract Nodes Table from
  Graph
- [`get_graph_info()`](get_graph_info.md) : Extract Graph Information
- [`igraphedit()`](igraphedit.md) : Run Interactive Graph Editor
- [`push_to_cytoscape()`](push_to_cytoscape.md) : Push Graph to
  Cytoscape
- [`run_pgdcm_auto()`](run_pgdcm_auto.md) : Run Integrated Workflow
  (Prior, MCMC, Posterior)
- [`run_predictive_check()`](run_predictive_check.md) : Run Predictive
  Check (Prior or Posterior)
- [`validate_graph_and_data()`](validate_graph_and_data.md) : Validate
  Graph against Dataset
